allow: Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" auth login --web --git-protocol https)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" repo create code-to-docs --public --source=. --remote=origin --push)
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" api repos/chansushin/code-to-docs/pages -X POST -f build_type=legacy -f source='{""branch"":""master"",""path"":""/""}')
Bash("/c/Program Files/GitHub CLI/gh.exe" api repos/chansushin/code-to-docs/pages -X POST -f build_type=legacy -F source[branch]=master -F source[path]="/")
